mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clandb.bellatra_personal_score_new (character_id, character_name, character_class, character_level, kills, score, unix_time, date) VALUES (#{characterId}, #{characterName}, #{characterClass}, #{characterLevel}, #{kills}, #{score}, #{unixTime}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE clandb.bellatra_personal_score_new SET character_name = #{newName} WHERE character_name = #{oldName}
